message:
feat(assign): Add round-robin strategy for ntm assign (bd-l4y4)

Implement round-robin assignment strategy that distributes work evenly
across agents in cyclical order.

Key features:
- Even distribution: 12 beads / 4 agents = 3, 3, 3, 3
- Uneven handling: 13 beads / 4 agents = 4, 3, 3, 3 (first gets +1)
- Deterministic ordering (same inputs = same outputs)
- Filters unavailable agents before assignment
- Score is 1.0 for all assignments (no capability scoring)
- Parses "round-robin", "roundrobin", "rr" as aliases

All 12 round-robin tests pass covering:
- Even/uneven distribution
- More agents than beads (3/5 = 1,1,1,0,0)
- Single bead case (1/4 = 1,0,0,0)
- Empty inputs handling
- Deterministic behavior
- Bead priority ordering preservation
- Unavailable agent filtering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
